chetter-status.description: Show chetter runner health, running/pending tasks, and schedules.
chetter-status.template: Use the chetter MCP tools to produce a concise chetter operations status report. Call chetter_runner_health with include_tasks=true, chetter_list_tasks for status=running with limit=20, chetter_list_tasks for status=pending with limit=20, and chetter_list_triggers. Summarize fleet activity, runner image versions, running/stale/pending task counts, each active task, and all triggers. If an MCP call fails, include the exact error and continue. Do not edit files.

chetter-tasks.description: List recent Chetter tasks with status summary.
chetter-tasks.template: Run chetter_list_tasks to get recent tasks. Summarize: which are running, done, errored, and pending. For running tasks note if any are stale (>10min since last event). Keep output concise.

chetter-submit.description: Submit a new task to the Chetter runner fleet.
chetter-submit.template: Ask the user for the task prompt, then submit via chetter_submit_task. Ask for git_url if not obvious, default git_ref to main. Suggest agent_image if known. Let the user optionally specify agent, provider_id, model_id, and timeout_sec. Return the task ID.

chetter-triggers.description: List Chetter triggers (cron schedules and PR review webhooks).
chetter-triggers.template: Run chetter_list_triggers to list all triggers. Compare enabled vs disabled counts and show the name, trigger_type, and prompt summary for each trigger. Keep output concise.

chetter-cancel.description: Cancel a pending or running Chetter task.
chetter-cancel.template: Cancel the specified chetter task. Ask for the task ID if not provided. Use chetter_cancel_task with the given ID and optionally a reason. Confirm the result.

chetter-export.description: Get the session export (markdown transcript) for a completed Chetter task.
chetter-export.template: Ask for the task ID if not provided. Use chetter_task_export with the given ID. Return the full export markdown to the user. If no export is available, explain that the task may not have completed or the export failed.

chetter-sessions.description: List recent Chetter agent sessions and their runs.
chetter-sessions.template: Run chetter_list_agent_sessions with limit=20. Summarize sessions by status and resume_mode. For any paused or errored session, call chetter_agent_session_status and show its runs, pinned runner, checkpoint, and latest error. Keep output concise.

chetter-model-catalog.description: Show the current Chetter model/provider catalog.
chetter-model-catalog.template: Run chetter_get_model_catalog. Summarize the active catalog, default provider/model, provider count, model count, and source. If the source is built-in, note that a DEFINITIONS_REPO can override it. Do not edit files.

chetter-sync-definitions.description: Re-pull the Chetter definitions repo and reload configs.
chetter-sync-definitions.template: Run chetter_sync_definitions to pull the latest definitions from the DEFINITIONS_REPO. Then run chetter_get_model_catalog to confirm the refreshed catalog. Do not edit files.

chetter-definitions.description: List Chetter definition sources and indexed definitions.
chetter-definitions.template: Run chetter_list_definition_sources, then run chetter_list_definitions. Summarize sources, last sync times, definition counts by type, and any obvious missing expected definitions. Do not edit files.

chetter-definition-proposals.template: Run chetter_list_definition_proposals with limit=20. Summarize open proposals, PR URLs, changed files, and any live status available from chetter_get_definition_proposal. Do not edit files.
